data.body: CHECKPOINT 1: Ticket read. Task: Create tests/hooks/test-worktree-merge-conflict.sh with 3 RED tests for merge conflict detection and escalation during worktree-to-session merges. Per-worktree-review-commit.md Step 6 describes the conflict handling protocol: on conflict, run git merge --abort, flag for re-implementation, do NOT remove worktree, continue to next worktree. CHECKPOINT 2: Reference files read. test-merge-state-worktree.sh shows the helper pattern: _make_worktree_to_session_merge_repo creates bare origin + session clone + linked worktree. Uses _TEST_TMPDIRS array with trap for cleanup. Uses _snapshot_fail / assert_pass_if_clean pattern. Tests are structural lifecycle tests (not against unwritten code).
